prompt: Refined minimal logo: A bold geometric uppercase P in dark charcoal (#2D3239) on white. The P has uniform stroke weight, slightly rounded corners, and a clean semicircular bowl. Inside the bowl's counter (negative space), there is a small broadcast/signal icon — a solid dot with one concentric arc radiating upward-right, suggesting a ping or signal pulse. The icon sits naturally within the P's counter space. Variations: try different proportions of the P, different sizes of the signal icon within the counter, and one version with two arcs instead of one. Ultra clean, professional, flat design. No extra text.
